# Juan Pablo Lopez

> Software engineer focused on building reliable systems. I care about clean APIs, observability, and keeping infrastructure simple. Currently building open-source developer tools in Rust. Based in UK.

## Pages

- [Home](https://juanpalopez.github.io/): Hero, about, featured projects, and latest writing posts.
- [Projects](https://juanpalopez.github.io/projects/): All projects with descriptions, tech stack, and links.
- [Writing](https://juanpalopez.github.io/writing/): Devlog posts on backend engineering, tooling, and systems.

## Writing

- [Setting up a Go project from scratch, the way I like it](https://juanpalopez.github.io/writing/setting-up-a-go-project-from-scratch-the-way-i-like-it/): Directory structure, Makefile, linter configuration, and Docker setup for Go projects. Tags: go, tooling, taskqueue.

## Projects

- [job-scheduler-cpp](https://github.com/juanpalopez/job-scheduler-cpp): Type-safe job scheduler in C++ that queues and runs jobs at specified delays. Uses modern C++ idioms — templates, std::chrono, and concurrency primitives. Status: shipped.
- [coingecko-cli](https://github.com/juanpalopez/coingecko-cli): CLI tool in Rust that wraps the CoinGecko free-tier API. Supports ping, simple, and asset-platforms commands with rate limiting (10–30 calls/min). Status: in progress.

## Currently building

- rust-backtesting-engine — a backtesting engine written in Rust. Status: in progress.

- Email: juanpablolopez@outlook.com
